<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Vue 3 + TypeScript project for a financial planner web application. Use Pinia for state management, Vue Router for routing, and follow best practices for scalable, maintainable code. Integrate with a .NET Core backend via REST API. Use ESLint and Prettier for code quality.
